_barrier_note: Asymmetric ATR Triple Barrier from the momentum-direction entry: TP = TB_ATR_TP*ATR14, SL = TB_ATR_SL*ATR14. Reward:risk b = TB_ATR_TP/TB_ATR_SL shapes the label geometry (one 2xATR win covers two 1xATR losses). Under CAPITAL_MODE=all_in every trade reinvests the full running capital; b no longer feeds a sizing formula (the previous Kelly-epoch used it in f=clip(lambda*(p-(1-p)/b),0,cap)).

ENTRY_GATE._note: Meta-labeling PRIMARY filter — a fixed, Train-only, causal (features at t0) rule that keeps only significant-move setups so the XGBoost secondary is not flooded with noise: |log_return_5| >= vol_floor_k * realized_volatility_20 (1h features). enabled=false reproduces the original every-bar candidate set. NOT per-asset tuned.

_optuna_objective_note: L7 selects XGBoost hyper-params by Train OOF trading LOG-GROWTH at ONE shared floor-respecting operating point per trial (accumulate-then-select over OPERATING_SPACE.theta_scoring via iterators/op_select.py — never a per-fold best theta), aligning Optuna with STRATEGY_OBJECTIVE.primary=train_oof_log_growth instead of the old ranking metric auc_pr. Under CAPITAL_MODE=all_in the grid scores at full-capital sizing (lambda=None); cv_auc_pr is reported only.

OPERATING_SPACE._note: SSOT of the deployable Train-OOF operating space — ONE theta spectrum + ONE trade floor + ONE robustness contract shared by HPO scoring, feature-search scoring and L8 calibration (no grid drift). theta = full deployable spectrum: 2:1 TP/SL -> breakeven win-prob ~1/3 + costs ~0.40, hence [0.40..0.60] by 0.02. theta_scoring = the coarse SCORING subset used by HPO/search (every other point of theta — a TRUE subset, so a scorer never sees a point the seal cannot deploy); calibration selects on the full spectrum. min_oof_trades: a point below this Train-OOF trade floor cannot win anywhere (min-2-trades mandate; Train-OOF ONLY, never post-hoc OOS). min_active_folds / max_fold_trade_share: the calibrated point must earn its trades in >= min_active_folds folds with no single fold holding more than max_fold_trade_share of them (a one-fold burst is not evidence); relaxation is flagged fold_spread_relaxed, never silent. Selection prefers the interior of the one-SE plateau over a spectrum edge; an edge choice is flagged theta_boundary (audit).

_metric_roles.train_oof_log_growth: OBJECTIVE — the one maximized quantity (HPO, feature search, calibration; Train-OOF only)
_metric_roles.profit_factor: GATE / REPORT — never maximized; unrankable below 2 model trades (PF_ZERO_GROSS_LOSS_POLICY)
_metric_roles.trade_count: CONSTRAINT — the min_oof_trades floor; never a target to maximize (activity is not evidence of edge)
_metric_roles.hodl_return: BENCHMARK — compared against, never a decision input
_metric_roles.oos_metrics: REPORT-ONLY — the one-shot OOS read never feeds back into any choice (ML-vs-HODL included)

_capital_note: all_in_compounding_per_asset: every trade reinvests the FULL running capital from the same $1000 start — the identical capital game buy-and-hold plays (each asset traded separately, no cross-asset accumulation). The KELLY_* keys below are inert in this mode and kept for the previous epoch's reproducibility.
